ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transit_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of service at the stop (e.g., reactivate, decommission) */,
  "on_street" TEXT /* Primary street where the stop is located */,
  "at_street" TEXT /* Cross street of the stop */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the stop relative to the street */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location code for the stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude for precise location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude for precise location */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone or district the stop belongs to */,
  "accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stop is accessible to people with disabilities */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the stop can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit stop */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the stop (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the status started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the status ended or is expected to end */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_status_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES transit_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit stop */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the technician assigned to the maintenance */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES transit_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the service line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service line */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the service line route in kilometers */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the service line operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_lines" (
  "stop_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-line association */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit stop */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service line */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Order of the stop in the service line route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_lines_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES transit_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_lines_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES service_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., supervisor, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., maintenance, operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service notification */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit stop */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification ends */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who issued the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_notifications_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_notifications_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES transit_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit stop being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stop data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stop data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES transit_stops ("stop_id")
)
